devdoc.details: Core trading engine. Opens and closes encrypted ETH/USD positions.      Size, margin, and entry price are all encrypted. Leverage and direction are plaintext.

closePosition(uint256).details: Owner closes their own position. PnL settled, remaining margin returned.

liquidatePosition(uint256,address).details: Called by LiquidationEngine after verifying position is underwater.

openPosition(bytes32,bytes,bytes32,bytes.details: Open a position. User provides encrypted margin + size, plaintext direction + leverage.

SenderNotAllowedToUseHandle(bytes32,addr.notice: Returned if the sender is not allowed to use the handle.

ZamaProtocolUnsupported().notice: Returned if the Zama protocol is not supported on the current chain
